subject: Whimsicott, a round fluffy white Pokemon with green curled horns, in a cozy domestic interior scene
description: A small, very round Pokemon covered in white fluffy material sits in what appears to be a cozy indoor setting. It has distinctive curled green ram-like horns and a soft body that looks like cotton or a cloud. The creature is positioned centrally with its face looking outward, conveying a gentle and content expression. The background includes soft pastel colors suggesting a warm domestic interior, with light pink and peachy tones. The overall scene has a warm, soft mood with diffuse lighting.
foreground: Round fluffy white Pokemon with green curled horns seated calmly
background: Soft pastel domestic interior with warm peachy-pink tones
